zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Isabel Chevrecourt於大約1150年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾卡爾頓 在 林德利可時，她的父親Sir Jordan de Chevrecourt37歲，母親Avice de Alfreton33歲。她和Sir Robert de Furneaux至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於大約1233年在她的家鄉享年85歲。

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Isabel Chevrecourt was born about 1150, in Carlton in Lindrick, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Jordan de Chevrecourt, was 37 and her mother, Avice de Alfreton, was 33. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Sir Robert de Furneaux. She died about 1233, in her hometown, at the age of 85.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Isabel Chevrecourt est née environ 1150, à Carlton in Lindrick, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Jordan de Chevrecourt, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Avice de Alfreton, avait 33 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Sir Robert de Furneaux. Elle est décédée environ 1233, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 85 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Isabel Chevrecourt um 1150 in Carlton in Lindrick, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Jordan de Chevrecourt 37 und ihre Mutter Avice de Alfreton 33. Sie hatte mit Sir Robert de Furneaux mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1233 im Alter von 85 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Sir Robert de Furneaux. Morì circa 1233, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 85 anni.

ko.Carlton in Lindrick, Nottinghamshire, En: 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 칼턴 인 린드릭
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Isabel Chevrecourt(이)가 대략 1150년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 칼턴 인 린드릭에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Jordan de Chevrecourt(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Avice de Alfreton(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 Sir Robert de Furneaux(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1233년 그녀의 고향에서 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Isabel Chevrecourt родилась около 1150 г. в местности карлтон ин линдрикк, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Jordan de Chevrecourt было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Avice de Alfreton, 33. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Sir Robert de Furneaux. Она умерла около 1233 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 85 лет.
